name: CM_PICKER_VERTICAL2ND
description: Second-depth vertical picker with title, unit label, and item list. Handles up/down navigation internally, delegates OK/LEFT/RIGHT/BACK to external handler. Shows title at top, dividers around selection area, optional unit label. Supports item-based unit hiding.
visualForm: Title bar (36px) → vertical picker with dividers (top: 104px, bottom: 172px) → optional unit label → gradient mask
descriptionKo: 타이틀, 단위 레이블, 항목 리스트를 갖춘 2차 깊이 세로 피커입니다. 상하 탐색은 내부에서 처리하고 OK/LEFT/RIGHT/BACK 키를 외부 핸들러로 위임합니다.
descriptionEn: Second-depth vertical picker with title, unit label, and item list. Handles up/down navigation internally, delegates OK/LEFT/RIGHT/BACK to external handler. Shows title at top, dividers around selection area, optional unit label. Supports item-based unit hiding.
